name: Fish in Foil
recipeIngredient: 6 oz potatoes, peeled and cut into french fries, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the fish fillets on each piece of foil.
2. Sprinkle each fillet with lemon juice and paprika.
3. Place half of the onion slices on each fillet.
4. Mix parsley and chives together.
5. Roll a potato in the parsley mixture.
6. Arrange potato sticks around each fillet.
7. Season each fillet with salt and pepper.
8. Fold foil to secure tightly.
9. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
10. Open foil and dot each fillet with 1 tbsp margarine.
11. Makes 2 servings for dinner. May also be microwaved for 12-15 minutes (not in foil). This is an old WW recipe and should be adjusted according to today's weights, etc.
